items.name: Pit Wall
items.description: Dig into any completed F1 session — theoretical best laps, race history, tyre strategy and more — or switch to the live control-room feed while a session is green.

items.name: Perfect Stop
items.description: A relaxing F1 pit-stop puzzle — plan the crew's jobs, respect the dependencies, and nail the perfect stop.

items.name: F1 Dashboard
items.description: The full F1 analysis suite — deep qualifying analysis and race telemetry built on FastF1.

items.name: Spotkick
items.description: Penalty intelligence built on open football data. Placement, conversion, and a pressure index.

items.name: Betting Tracker
items.description: A spreadsheet tracking simulated football bets, including automated bet selection, staking, and ROI.

items.name: Panhandle
items.description: A shared shopping list and meal planner for two, with live sync and multi-tenant lists.

items.name: Panello
items.description: Family dashboard pulling calendar, photos, and weather into one shared screen.

items.name: Pulsar
items.description: Crypto dashboard tracking prices, holdings, and market signals.

items.name: PDF Merger
items.description: Combine, reorder, and split PDF files entirely in the browser.

items.name: Black Hole
items.description: Orbit a Schwarzschild black hole in real time — gravitational lensing, a warped accretion disk, Doppler beaming and redshift, with an in-page primer on the physics.

items.name: Double Pendulum
items.description: A swarm of double pendulums released from nearly identical angles, each tracing a colored fading trail — watch deterministic chaos and the butterfly effect unfold in real time, with an in-page primer on the physics.

items.name: Ocean Waves
items.description: A single propagating wave with particle-velocity arrows that fade out with depth, driven by any of six wave theories — Linear, Stokes 2nd- and 5th-order, cnoidal, solitary, and trochoidal (Gerstner) — plus a six-theory comparison overlay and Morison/MacCamy-Fuchs wave-force calculations on a monopile, with an in-page primer on the physics.
